allow: Bash(sshpass -p artlynk ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -o ConnectTimeout=8 root@192.168.1.22 ' *)
Bash(sshpass -p artlynk scp -O -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null bridge/board/radxa-zero/rootfs-overlay/usr/bin/artlynk-view root@192.168.1.22:/usr/bin/artlynk-view)
Bash(sshpass -p artlynk ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.22 ' *)
Bash(sshpass -p artlynk ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null root@192.168.1.22 'mkdir -p /lib/firmware/meson/vdec')
Bash(sshpass -p artlynk scp -O -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null bridge/docker/images/fw/g12a_*.bin root@192.168.1.22:/lib/firmware/meson/vdec/)

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "echo '=== config files ==='; find /usr /etc /usrdata /app /root /home -maxdepth 4 -name 'cfg_*.json' 2>/dev/null | head; echo '=== usrdata ==='; ls -la /usrdata/ 2>/dev/null; echo '=== running app ==='; ps 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'arlink|fpv|venc|rtsp' | grep -v grep | head")

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "echo '=== all CodecType/enType/EncType fields ==='; grep -rinE 'CodecType|enType|EncType|VencType' /usrdata/lowdelay/lowdelay_cfg/ 2>/dev/null; echo '=== any explicit 265 / hevc ==='; grep -rinE ': *265|hevc|h265' /usrdata/lowdelay/lowdelay_cfg/ 2>/dev/null | head")

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "echo '=== tap server :9000 up? ==='; \(netstat -ltn 2>/dev/null || ss -ltn 2>/dev/null\) | grep -E ':9000' || echo 'checking via /proc'; grep -l ':2328' /proc/net/tcp >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'port 9000 \(0x2328\) listening' || grep -iE ':2328' /proc/net/tcp 2>/dev/null | head -1; echo '=== app alive ==='; ps 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'arlink_fpv' | grep -v grep")
Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "cat /tmp/venc_chns.log 2>/dev/null; echo '---create---'; cat /tmp/venc_create.log 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-50")

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "echo '=== SD / mmc present? ==='; cat /proc/partitions 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'mmcblk|sd[a-z]'; ls -ld /mnt/sdcard* /mnt/sd* 2>/dev/null; df 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'mmc|sdcard|media' | head; echo '=== record cfg context ==='; grep -inE 'rec|Rec' /usrdata/lowdelay/lowdelay_cfg/cfg_mid.json | head")
Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "cat /tmp/venc_create.log 2>/dev/null; echo '--- streams ---'; cat /tmp/venc_chns.log 2>/dev/null")
Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "cat /tmp/venc_chns.log 2>/dev/null || echo '\(empty - no frames yet, need a drone\)'")

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "echo '=== venc/chn8/h264 errors in dmesg ==='; dmesg 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'venc|h264|encode|fail|err|illegal|chn' | tail -12; echo '=== link / video received? ==='; dmesg 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'rx|link|signal|vdec|decode' | tail -6; echo '=== media-mem \(heavy use = video pipeline active\) ==='; head -4 /proc/media-mem 2>/dev/null")
Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "echo 'GET8:'; cat /tmp/venc_get8.log 2>/dev/null || echo '\(none\)'; echo 'CHNS:'; cat /tmp/venc_chns.log 2>/dev/null || echo '\(none\)'")

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'for f in /usr/lib/*.so* /lib/*.so* /usr/lib/*/*.so*; do if grep -aq AR_MPI_VENC_GetStream "$f" 2>/dev/null; then echo "LIB: $f"; grep -aoE "AR_MPI_VENC_[A-Za-z0-9_]+" "$f" | sort -u; break; fi; done')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'echo '\\''=== UVC host driver? ==='\\''; \(zcat /proc/config.gz 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '\\''USB_VIDEO_CLASS|UVC'\\''\) || echo '\\''no config.gz'\\''; find /lib/modules -iname '\\''*uvc*'\\'' 2>/dev/null; echo '\\''uvc syms in kernel:'\\''; grep -ic uvc /proc/kallsyms 2>/dev/null; echo '\\''=== current video nodes ==='\\''; ls /dev/video* 2>/dev/null || echo none; echo '\\''=== dwc2 / usb host capable? ==='\\''; \(zcat /proc/config.gz 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '\\''DWC2|USB_OTG|USB_DWC2'\\''\) || true; dmesg 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '\\''dwc2'\\'' | head -4; echo '\\''=== display VO lib ==='\\''; for l in /usr/lib/*.so*; do grep -alq AR_MPI_VO_ "$l" 2>/dev/null && echo "$l"; done | head -2')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'echo "=== HOST driver \(uvcvideo\) syms ==="; grep -oE "uvc_\(probe|v4l2_open|video_decode_start|queue_init|status_init|ctrl_init_device\)" /proc/kallsyms 2>/dev/null | sort -u; echo "=== GADGET \(f_uvc\) syms ==="; grep -oE "uvcg_[a-z_]+|uvc_function_" /proc/kallsyms 2>/dev/null | sort -u | head -5; echo "=== display MPI libs ==="; for l in /usr/lib/*.so*; do grep -alq AR_MPI_VO_ "$l" 2>/dev/null && echo "$l: VO"; grep -alq AR_MPI_VPSS "$l" 2>/dev/null && echo "$l: VPSS"; done | sort -u')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'echo "=== fb / drm nodes ==="; ls /dev/fb* /dev/dri/* 2>/dev/null || echo none; echo "=== display-related MPI funcs in libs ==="; grep -ahoE "AR_MPI_[A-Z]+_[A-Za-z]+" /usr/lib/*.so* 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "_VO_|_VOU|_DISP|HDMI|_LCD|SCREEN|LAYER|_VID_|VPSS|_GRP|_CHN" | sort -u | head -30')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'echo "size:"; cat /sys/class/graphics/fb0/virtual_size 2>/dev/null; echo "bpp:"; cat /sys/class/graphics/fb0/bits_per_pixel 2>/dev/null; echo "name:"; cat /sys/class/graphics/fb0/name 2>/dev/null; echo "stride:"; cat /sys/class/graphics/fb0/stride 2>/dev/null; echo "--- fbset ---"; fbset -i 2>/dev/null | head -14')
Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "ls -l /tmp/bars.fb; for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do dd if=/tmp/bars.fb of=/dev/fb0 bs=1M 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; done; echo blits-done")

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'echo "=== usb_role switch \(clean host flip?\) ==="; ls /sys/class/usb_role/ 2>/dev/null && for r in /sys/class/usb_role/*/role; do echo "$r = $\(cat $r 2>/dev/null\)"; done || echo "no usb_role class"; echo "=== cmdline usb/otg ==="; cat /proc/cmdline | tr " " "\\n" | grep -iE "otg|dwc2|dr_mode|usb|gadget"; echo "=== dwc2 dr_mode in dts/sysfs ==="; find /sys/firmware/devicetree -path "*8000000*" -name "dr_mode" 2>/dev/null -exec cat {} \\; ; echo "=== udc + current gadget ==="; cat /sys/class/udc/*/state 2>/dev/null; ls /sys/kernel/config/usb_gadget/ 2>/dev/null')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'echo "=== host USB stack present? ==="; ls /sys/bus/usb/devices/ 2>/dev/null || echo "NO usb bus"; ls -d /sys/class/usb_host/* 2>/dev/null || echo "no usb_host class"; echo "=== dwc2 debugfs \(force-mode knob?\) ==="; D=$\(find /sys/kernel/debug -maxdepth 3 \\\( -iname "*8000000*" -o -iname "*dwc2*" \\\) 2>/dev/null | head -1\); echo "dir=[$D]"; ls "$D" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== dwc2 boot dmesg ==="; dmesg | grep -iE "dwc2|s_hcd|otg|host|gadget|gusbcfg" | head -14')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'D=/sys/kernel/debug/8000000.usb; echo "=== dr_mode ==="; cat $D/dr_mode 2>/dev/null; echo "=== hw_params \(host capable?\) ==="; cat $D/hw_params 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "op_mode|otg|num_host|host_chan|dma"; echo "=== params \(configured dr_mode\) ==="; cat $D/params 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "dr_mode|otg|host|speed"; echo "=== current OTG state \(head\) ==="; head -25 $D/state 2>/dev/null; echo "=== is dr_mode debugfs writable? ==="; ls -l $D/dr_mode')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "chmod +x /tmp/fbtap; setsid /tmp/fbtap </dev/null >/tmp/fbtap.log 2>&1 & sleep 1; \(netstat -ltn 2>/dev/null || ss -ltn 2>/dev/null\) | grep 9001 && echo PORT_UP || echo no-port")

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "killall fbtap 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; chmod +x /tmp/fbtap; setsid /tmp/fbtap </dev/null >/tmp/fbtap.log 2>&1 & sleep 1; \(netstat -ltn 2>/dev/null || ss -ltn 2>/dev/null\) | grep 9001 && echo PORT_UP || cat /tmp/fbtap.log")
Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run "\(netstat -tn 2>/dev/null || ss -tn 2>/dev/null\) | grep 9001 | grep -iE 'estab' || echo 'no established client'")

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'echo procs: $\(ps 2>/dev/null | grep -c "[f]btap"\); \(netstat -ltn 2>/dev/null || ss -ltn 2>/dev/null\) | grep 9001 && echo LISTENING || echo NOT-LISTENING; echo "--- log ---"; tail -4 /tmp/fbtap.log 2>/dev/null')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'killall fbtap 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; setsid /tmp/fbtap </dev/null >/tmp/fbtap.log 2>&1 & sleep 1; \(netstat -ltn 2>/dev/null || ss -ltn 2>/dev/null\) | grep 9001 && echo PORT_UP || echo FAIL')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'ls -l /tmp/fbtap; killall fbtap 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; setsid /tmp/fbtap </dev/null >/tmp/fbtap.log 2>&1 & sleep 1; \(netstat -ltn 2>/dev/null||ss -ltn 2>/dev/null\)|grep 9001 && echo PORT_UP')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run '\(netstat -tn 2>/dev/null||ss -tn 2>/dev/null\)|grep 9001|grep -i estab && echo HAS-CLIENT || echo no-client; echo procs:$\(ps 2>/dev/null|grep -c "[f]btap"\)')
Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run '\(netstat -tn 2>/dev/null||ss -tn 2>/dev/null\)|grep 9001|grep -i estab && echo HAS-CLIENT; echo procs:$\(ps 2>/dev/null|grep -c "[f]btap"\)')
Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'df -h /tmp 2>/dev/null | tail -1; rm -f /tmp/bars.fb /tmp/fbtap.sig 2>/dev/null; sync; echo after:; df -h /tmp 2>/dev/null | tail -1')

Bash(./.venv/bin/python tools/goggle-net.py run 'killall fbtap 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; setsid /tmp/fbtap </dev/null >/tmp/fbtap.log 2>&1 & sleep 1; \(netstat -ltn 2>/dev/null||ss -ltn 2>/dev/null\)|grep 9001 && echo PORT_UP')
